title: Asymptote
description:
It is 2138, almost a hundred years since the first generations settled on Mars. The planet is no longer just a frontier. For those born beneath its red sky, it has become home.

But when uncontrollable AI-driven robots begin to tear through the colony’s fragile order, survivors are left stranded across the surface of Mars. Meanwhile, unexpected distant orders only make the situation worse.

Asymptote is a 2D top-down rescue-survival game set on Mars, where every mission is a race against time, hostile threats, interact with various "things" on Mars and deal with unexpected situations.

Game Features:

• Pilot an anti-gravity rescue craft across the surface of Mars.

• Save stranded colonists before the mission window closes.

• Destroy hostile robots, drones, and other threats during each run.

• Loot weapons, items, gold coins, microchips, and other resources to survive longer and improve your chances.

• Upgrade your craft and grow stronger across future attempts.

• Unlock persistent skills through the talent tree using skill points gained by leveling up.

• Use unique tools and interactions that can change how you deal with objects, enemies, and rescue situations.

• Rescue different people to unlock new loot, resources, events, and possible story paths.

• Make choices that may shape the ending and decide the future there.

• Unlock engaging mechanisms while the game goes further and becomes harder to survive!

What begins as a mission to save survivors slowly becomes a story about loyalty, belonging, and the choices left to people caught between two worlds.

Even if a mission fails, the skills you unlock through the skill tree will stay with you for future runs.

Run by run, you will get closer to the truth behind the crisis, and closer to a final decision that could shape the fate of the people of Mars. But the closer you get, the harder it becomes to decide where you stand between duty and freedom, origin and belonging.

Good luck.
description_short: A 2D top-down rescue-survival game set on Mars, where you pilot an anti-gravity craft, save stranded colonists, destroy hostile machines, and face unpredictable encounters shaped by upgrades, unique tools, story choices and mysterious game mechanisms.
